h1: Glow-worm Boiler Repair in London and Sussex
intro: We repair Glow-worm boilers across London and Sussex for common issues such as pressure loss, ignition problems, leaks, poor hot water and repeated shutdowns.
pricingGuidance: Glow-worm repair pricing depends on the confirmed fault, the boiler model and whether parts are required.
localProof: Helping London and Sussex customers with Glow-worm faults where recurring shutdowns and pressure problems need proper diagnosis.

sections.heading: Common Glow-worm issues
sections.body: Glow-worm repair calls often involve pressure loss, ignition faults, water leaks and hot water performance complaints.

sections.heading: Why repeated shutdowns matter
sections.body: If the boiler is repeatedly shutting down, the underlying cause should be diagnosed properly rather than simply reset and monitored.

sections.heading: Repair advice with context
sections.body: We explain whether the fault is straightforward, whether repeat history changes the decision and whether replacement is worth considering.
